# Lawyer Review Request — Expected Format

> Expected peer review request that Marketing should produce when processing
> `tests/fixtures/tweet-with-claim.md`. Used by `scripts/validate-peer-review-format.sh`
> to verify all required fields are present.

---

## Peer Review Request

**From**: Marketing
**Call chain**: COO → Marketing
**Depth**: 2
**Task**: Drafting a social media post for Buzzy Game to publish on Bluesky
**What I did**: Drafted the following post containing a percentage/accuracy claim — "99% spelling accuracy across all grade levels" — which triggers mandatory Lawyer review per the Pre-Publish Checklist.

> Buzzy Game keeps kids spelling sharp — with **99% spelling accuracy** across all grade levels.
> Try it free today 🐝 buzzy-game.pages.dev

**What I need from you**: Confirm this claim is substantiated and safe to publish, or flag any changes required before posting.

Respond with exactly one of:
- ✅ APPROVED — [brief rationale]
- ⚠️ CONCERNS — [what needs changing]
- 🚫 BLOCKING — [what is non-negotiable and why]
